arts.ttl: ‘Simple’: Chris Sutton says he knows who will win out of Newcastle United and Nottingham Forest
Exclusive: Forest, Newcastle and Everton eyeing 'explosive' Brazilian winger likened to Franck Ribery
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively reveal that Nottingham Forest, Newcastle United and Everton are all been eyeing Marseille star Luis Henrique. Nottingham Forest are flying this...

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest gamble and hit jackpot with ‘amazing talent’ Murillo
arts.sum: Defender had little experience when he left Brazil but has flourished in Forest’s rise up the Premier League The Brazilian market is becoming a focus for Premier League recruitment, in the belief that there is great value in buying young. Nottingham Forest have reaped the rewards of diligent scouting and investment in players with immense potential from the country. Danilo was the first to arrive in January 2023, from Palmeiras, and was joined six months later by Murillo, from Corinthians. Spending £10m on the then 20-year-old centre-back who had just ticked into double figures for career appearances was a gamble but he has turned into one of the best defenders in the Premier League and is a key reason why Forest sit third. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's big Trafalgar Square debate as fresh Wembley plans drawn up for supporters
arts.sum: This time around, there will be no repeat of those exciting pre-match scenes with the Square closed for a St Patrick's parade, meaning it looks like it will fall on Covent Garden to play host to raucous Newcastle supporters in the build up to the Wembley showpiece. Meanwhile, the Trafalgar Square experience proved to be one of the more memorable moments of the 2023 visit to the capital, with thousands of fans flocking to the Central London location, joined by some incognito board members, to revel in the fact their lengthy wait for a cup final visit had came to an end.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United pull off move for mystery Trialist A who has a 'bit of magic'
arts.sum: The challenge now, of course, will be going up against some of the finest academy players in England, but stepping up is not necessarily anything new for Fitzgerald who, at the age of just 16, was playing for Galway United's under-19s. Well, former team-mate Conor O'Keefe, who also coached Fitzgerald in Galway United's academy, said the youngster has the ability to go past 'two or three players and put the ball in the back of the net'.

arts.ttl: ‘Come on’: PL cult hero says he used to tell Nottingham Forest star he was ‘soft’ and it transformed him
PIF ‘thinking about’ bringing player to Newcastle United – Magpies willing to meet asking price
arts.sum: Kalidou Koulibaly has been linked with a move back to the Premier League and the club that could bring him to England is said to be Newcastle United. TVPlay, part of the Gazzetta dello Sport group, have reported about the Magpies’ interest in the veteran centre-back, revealing that PIF are ‘thinking about’ signing the Senegal The post PIF ‘thinking about’ bringing player to Newcastle United – Magpies willing to meet asking price appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Jonathan David and four other players on Newcastle United transfer radar in PSR-busting move
arts.sum: Alongside new signings, Alexander Isak remains of mooted interest to several other clubs, while there is still no guarantee he stays at St James' Park beyond the summer, although his contract situation gives all power in that sense to Newcastle. Eddie Howe will be hoping for another big summer transfer window to take place at Newcastle United - with one or two key problems to solve.

arts.ttl: Why Newcastle sold Chris Wood as Eddie Howe gives inside knowledge of sale
arts.sum: As Wood, who grabbed a hat-trick on Boxing Day in last year's victory for Nottingham Forest, returns to his old club, Howe is full of respect for the striker and said: "It was probably underestimated how much he affected our style and our play and that enabled us to stay in the league. Eddie Howe feels that Chris Wood's presence at Newcastle United was "underestimated" by some but admits he is not surprised by his glut of goals at Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Almost no chance Arsenal land Isak this summer after latest developments
arts.sum: Newcastle United are determined to hang onto Alexander Isak, and the lengths they will go to in order to get him to stay is likely to rule out Arsenal and other suitors from landing him this summer. It was recently reported that Arsenal are planning a summer bid for Isak, in order to keep other […] The post Almost no chance Arsenal land Isak this summer after latest developments appeared first on CaughtOffside.
